title: leleba liukiuensis
side_effects: Leleba liukiuensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. Overdosing on the plant can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea, as well as interact negatively with certain medications. In rare cases, prolonged use of leleba liukiuensis has been linked to kidney and liver damage. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
